flows.name: Data Upstream
flows.description: Telemetry, optimization signals, and verified operating outcomes move upstream from physical assets into executive and investor intelligence.
flows.businessMeaning: Turns asset reality into platform-grade visibility and confidence.

flows.name: Control Downstream
flows.description: Autonomous policy, dispatch commands, and recovery instructions move from supervisory intelligence into the field.
flows.businessMeaning: Protects uptime, improves efficiency, and compresses response time during volatility.

flows.name: Financial Flow
flows.description: Verified performance and supervisory outcomes feed the financial protocol and propagate into reporting, settlement, and investor visibility.
flows.businessMeaning: Bridges autonomous operations with monetization, reserves, and capital reporting.
